testcase.name: test_admin_login_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain access_token assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoiZjY1MzJkZDItMjg2Zi00OGJkLWI1YzctZTdiNWNjYTdjNGYzIiwiZW1haWwiOiJhZG1pbkBzZW9lbmdpbmUuaXQiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJjbGllbnRfaWQiOm51bGwsImV4cCI6MTc3MjM3MDE3OX0.ZqQ_EivEfo39nzE5dglrj8FhYaN6AW0NtHfgMBpoxUc', 'user': {'client_id': None, 'email': 'admin@seoengine.it', 'id': 'f6532dd2-286f-48bd-b5c7-e7b5cca7c4f3', 'name': 'Admin SEO', ...}}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_8.py:30: in test_admin_login_success assert "access_token" in data, "Response should contain access_token" E AssertionError: Response should contain access_token E assert 'access_token' in {'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjoiZjY1MzJkZDItMjg2Zi00OGJkLWI1YzctZTdiNWNjYTdjNGYzIiwiZW1haWwiOiJhZG1pbkBzZW9lbmdpbmUuaXQiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJjbGllbnRfaWQiOm51bGwsImV4cCI6MTc3MjM3MDE3OX0.ZqQ_EivEfo39nzE5dglrj8FhYaN6AW0NtHfgMBpoxUc', 'user': {'client_id': None, 'email': 'admin@seoengine.it', 'id': 'f6532dd2-286f-48bd-b5c7-e7b5cca7c4f3', 'name': 'Admin SEO', ...}}

testcase.name: test_simple_generate_without_client_id_for_admin_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing client_id, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_8.py:101: in test_simple_generate_without_client_id_for_admin_fails assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for missing client_id, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for missing client_id, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_serp_analyze_full_returns_competitors
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_8.py:124: in test_serp_analyze_full_returns_competitors assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Token non valido"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_serp_analyze_full_empty_keyword_fails

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty keyword, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_8.py:159: in test_serp_analyze_full_empty_keyword_fails assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for empty keyword, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for empty keyword, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration_8.py:171: in test_serp_search_returns_results assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 401: {"detail":"Token non valido"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
